pipeline_metadata.query_template:
Identify clauses related to:
- Regulatory compliance
- Data protection
- Audits and reporting
- GDPR requirements
- Privacy obligations
- Security standards
- Certification requirements

extracted_clauses: The Contractor shall comply with all GDPR requirements for data protection.
All personal data must be encrypted and stored in SOC2 certified facilities.
The service maintains ISO 27001 certification for information security.
HIPAA compliance is maintained for all healthcare-related data.
Data breach notification must be provided within 72 hours as per GDPR.
evidence: The Contractor shall comply with all GDPR requirements for data protection.
All personal data must be encrypted and stored in SOC2 certified facilities.
The service maintains ISO 27001 certification for information security.
HIPAA compliance is maintained for all healthcare-related data.
Data breach notification must be provided within 72 hours as per GDPR.

raw_context:
The Service Provider shall maintain compliance with all applicable regulatory requirements 
including SOC 2 Type II certification and ISO 27001 certification.

DATA PROTECTION AND PRIVACY

The Service Provider shall comply with all applicable data protection laws and regulations, 
including but not limited to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE

Regular compliance audits shall be conducted at least annually by an independent third party.
